title: Kazan, Tatarstan — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Kazan, Tatarstan: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Kazan is a city in Tatarstan with a population of 1,260,000. The capital of Tatarstan, a vibrant city where Russian and Tatar cultures blend, famous for its stunning white Kremlin and mosque.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
